title: Banks and texts
body: Your bank will not ask you to log in or confirm details via a link in a random text. When in doubt, call the number on the back of your card — not a number in the message.

title: One strong password or a manager
body: Reusing a simple password is risky. A password manager (often built into your phone) lets you have different, strong passwords without memorising all of them.

title: Video calls: check the icon
body: In most apps, a camera icon starts a video call and a phone icon is audio only. If you are unsure, ask the other person to call you so you can learn together.

title: App permissions
body: If an app asks for your location, microphone, or photos, ask yourself whether the app really needs it. You can always change this later in Settings.
